scripts.icons:generate: pnpm exec mpgd game icons generate . --kit-path ${MPGD_KIT_PATH:-__DEFAULT_KIT_PATH__}
scripts.icons:generate:devvit: pnpm exec mpgd game icons generate . --targets reddit --profile development --kit-path ${MPGD_KIT_PATH:-__DEFAULT_KIT_PATH__}
scripts.icons:generate:devvit:production: pnpm exec mpgd game icons generate . --targets reddit --profile production --kit-path ${MPGD_KIT_PATH:-__DEFAULT_KIT_PATH__}
scripts.icons:verify: pnpm exec mpgd game icons verify . --kit-path ${MPGD_KIT_PATH:-__DEFAULT_KIT_PATH__}
scripts.icons:inspect: pnpm exec mpgd game icons inspect . --kit-path ${MPGD_KIT_PATH:-__DEFAULT_KIT_PATH__}
scripts.build:ait: pnpm exec mpgd target build ait staging --variant wrapper --targets-file ./mpgd.targets.json --kit-path ${MPGD_KIT_PATH:-__DEFAULT_KIT_PATH__}
scripts.build:ait:package: pnpm exec mpgd target build ait production --targets-file ./mpgd.targets.json --kit-path ${MPGD_KIT_PATH:-__DEFAULT_KIT_PATH__}
scripts.smoke:ait: pnpm exec mpgd target smoke ait --targets-file ./mpgd.targets.json --kit-path ${MPGD_KIT_PATH:-__DEFAULT_KIT_PATH__}
scripts.build:microsoft-store: pnpm exec mpgd target build microsoft-store production --targets-file ./mpgd.targets.json --kit-path "${MPGD_KIT_PATH:-__DEFAULT_KIT_PATH__}"
scripts.smoke:microsoft-store: pnpm exec mpgd target smoke microsoft-store --targets-file ./mpgd.targets.json --kit-path "${MPGD_KIT_PATH:-__DEFAULT_KIT_PATH__}"
scripts.preflight:microsoft-store: pnpm exec mpgd target preflight microsoft-store --targets-file ./mpgd.targets.json --kit-path "${MPGD_KIT_PATH:-__DEFAULT_KIT_PATH__}"
scripts.package:microsoft-store: pnpm exec mpgd target generate-package microsoft-store --targets-file ./mpgd.targets.json
scripts.build:verse8: pnpm exec mpgd target build verse8 production --targets-file ./mpgd.targets.json --kit-path ${MPGD_KIT_PATH:-__DEFAULT_KIT_PATH__}
scripts.smoke:verse8: pnpm exec mpgd target smoke verse8 --targets-file ./mpgd.targets.json --kit-path ${MPGD_KIT_PATH:-__DEFAULT_KIT_PATH__}
scripts.build:devvit: pnpm exec mpgd target build reddit production --targets-file ./mpgd.targets.json --kit-path ${MPGD_KIT_PATH:-__DEFAULT_KIT_PATH__}
scripts.build:devvit:staging: pnpm exec mpgd target build reddit staging --targets-file ./mpgd.targets.json --kit-path ${MPGD_KIT_PATH:-__DEFAULT_KIT_PATH__}
scripts.smoke:devvit: pnpm exec mpgd target smoke reddit --targets-file ./mpgd.targets.json --kit-path ${MPGD_KIT_PATH:-__DEFAULT_KIT_PATH__}
scripts.pages:build: pnpm legal:build && pnpm --dir apps/target-cloudflare-pages run build
scripts.pages:dev: pnpm legal:build && pnpm --dir apps/target-cloudflare-pages run dev
scripts.pages:preview: pnpm legal:build && pnpm --dir apps/target-cloudflare-pages run preview
